release_title: Flaw Covenant Archive Accessibility Mirror v1
purpose: GitHub Release accessibility mirror for Flaw Covenant archive ZIP files referenced by Bitcoin / Guardian Attestation evidence pointers.

diagnosis.issue: gateway availability problem: arweave.net returned 404 for large files while permagate.io returned valid ZIP payloads
diagnosis.remediation: GitHub Release mirror for ordinary browser/download access

evidence_boundary: This is a non-amending accessibility mirror. It does not replace the original Bitcoin-inscribed or Guardian Attestation Arweave pointers and does not amend the original evidence chain.

files.role: Core Object Alpha flaw / fingerprint high-resolution photo archive
